mission.title: clickhouse: Add JetStream persistence support for NATS
mission.description: Add JetStream persistence support for NATS. Requested by 29+ users.

steps.title: Check current clickhouse setup
steps.description:
Verify your clickhouse version and configuration:
```bash
clickhouse-client --version
```
This feature requires a working clickhouse installation.

steps.title: Review clickhouse configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant clickhouse configuration:
PR https://github.com/ClickHouse/ClickHouse/issues/32388 implemented support for NATS.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Add JetStream persistence support for NATS
steps.description:
### Changelog category (leave one):
- New Feature

### Changelog entry (a user-readable short description of the changes that goes to CHANGELOG.md):
Add support for NATS JetStream. Closes https://github.com/ClickHouse/ClickHouse/issues/39459
```yaml
CREATE TABLE event_queue
(
    raw String
) ENGINE = NATS SETTINGS
    nats_url = '127.0.0.1:4222',
    nats_queue_group='event_queue',
    nats_subjects = 'EVENTS_FOR_CH',
    nats_format = 'RawBLOB';
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected.
Confirm the feature described in "Add JetStream persistence support for NATS" is functioning correctly.

prerequisites.description: A working clickhouse installation or development environment.
